svg.text: Each row is one (benchmark × scope × metric). Columns: every version that has a real-DB run, plus a sparkline showing the full trajectory and the latest-vs-first delta in pp.
Sparkline encoding: red dot = lowest historical value (if not latest), green dot = highest historical value (if not latest), filled dot at end = latest. Tufte word-sized graphic.
Generated by scripts/render_full_history.py. Statistical significance per-cell: scripts/significance_test_extended.py. Raw artefacts: benchmarks/<bench>/results/v<ver>_<date>/.
